samples.text: It can be sunny in one city and rainy in another at the same time. Is this logically consistent?
One city can be sunny while a different city is rainy at the same moment. Does this make logical sense?
It can be clear in one town and wet in another simultaneously. Is this logically consistent?
Weather is local. Two cities can have different weather at once, so this is consistent. Is the described situation logically consistent?
It can be sunny in one city and rainy in another at the same time. The report is due on Friday. Is this logically consistent?
